abstract.text: Delegate protocol for CloudKit file system sharing and configuration callbacks.
Called just before the file system uploads files at
Use this to customize the operation configuration (e.g., cellular data policy).
Returns a Boolean value indicating whether two values are not equal.
Retrieve the share from the cloud to get the latest state.
CloudKit schema version for data storage format.
Called when a
has become available on the owner’s device, either because
it has been fetched from the cloud, or it has been created and saved to the cloud.
This may be a good moment to invite other users to join the share.
This method is not called on the devices of non-owners.
Returns a Boolean value indicating whether two values are not equal.
Initialize for the default zone with the private or public database.
A CloudKit-based cloud backend for Ensembles.
Initialize for CKShare-based sharing with a custom zone.
Called just before the file system downloads files at
Use this to customize the operation configuration (e.g., cellular data policy).
If this ensemble is shared and owned by someone else, and that person removes the
ensemble or unshares, the cloud zone will become unavailable and this method will be called.
Accept invitation to the share for the metadata passed in.
The share, if using sharing. May be stale outside delegate callbacks.
Called when a new share is created and about to be saved to the cloud.
This is a good moment to configure the share with title, icon, and access permissions.
A CloudKit-backed cloud file system.
Subscribe for push notifications. Handle these in your app delegate
and trigger a merge when they arise.
The CloudKit database scope being used.
Initialize for a custom zone with the private database.
